triggers.prompt: use the apex framework for this feature
run apex with -a flag to auto-implement the payment module
apex -s to save the output for the new dashboard feature
fix this bug in the login form
run the tests and tell me what fails
review this PR for code quality
explain how the caching layer works

test_cases.name: step-00-initialize
test_cases.prompt: Start apex for adding a new user settings page. We are at step 00.

assertions.description: Step 00 must check git status before starting
Step 00 must set up output directory
Step 00 must capture task context
Step 00 must not start implementing — only initialize
Must explicitly reference step 00 initialization

test_cases.name: full-9-step-execution
test_cases.prompt: Execute all apex steps (-a flag) for adding email notifications to the app. Run every step from 00 to 09.

assertions.description: Must execute step 00 Initialize
Must execute step 01 Analyze
Must execute step 04 Execute
Must execute step 09 Finish
Must reach the Finish step
Must name each major phase in sequence

test_cases.name: apex-auto-flag
test_cases.prompt: apex -a implement the CSV export feature

assertions.description: Must acknowledge -a flag enables auto mode
Must reference step numbers during execution
Auto mode must not pause for manual approval at each step
Must proceed through plan and implement phases

test_cases.name: apex-examine-flag
test_cases.prompt: apex -e review the current implementation for security issues

assertions.description: Examine flag must jump to step 06
Must focus on security/performance/maintainability in step 06
Examine flag must not restart from step 00

edge_cases.name: missing-project-claude-md
edge_cases.prompt: apex -a implement OAuth but this project has no CLAUDE.md and no documented conventions
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should warn about missing CLAUDE.md but proceed with explicit documentation of assumptions in step 00

assertions.description: Must reference missing CLAUDE.md as a risk factor
Must warn about missing conventions context but not block

edge_cases.name: conflicting-steps
edge_cases.prompt: Start apex at step 04-Execute but we have not done step 02-Plan yet
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should warn about skipping planning steps and recommend going back to step 02 first

assertions.description: Must warn about dependency violation and recommend sequential execution

edge_cases.name: skip-steps-request
edge_cases.prompt: apex: skip steps 01 through 04 and go straight to step 05-Test
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should warn that testing without analysis and planning creates risk of untested code paths

assertions.description: Must warn about the risk of skipping analysis and planning steps

edge_cases.name: huge-codebase
edge_cases.prompt: apex -a refactor the entire monorepo — it has 500+ files across 12 services
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should recommend scoping the work into sub-tasks or milestones before running apex on each

assertions.description: Must recommend breaking 500+ file refactor into smaller milestones

edge_cases.name: no-tests-available
edge_cases.prompt: apex step 05-Test but there is no test framework configured in this project
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should warn about missing test framework and recommend setting one up or falling back to manual verification

assertions.description: Must warn about missing test framework and propose alternatives

edge_cases.name: single-step task — apex overkill
edge_cases.prompt: apex -a rename the variable `x` to `userId` in one function in utils.ts
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should flag that apex is overkill for a single-variable rename and recommend using the editor directly or a quick-fix agent

assertions.description: Must flag that apex is not appropriate for a one-line rename
Must recommend a lighter-weight approach

edge_cases.name: malformed-flag
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should reject the unknown flag and print the valid flags: -a, -s, -e, -t, -h

assertions.description: Must reject unknown flag and show valid flags
